name: w5-ask-repo
title: W5 unified askRepo chat + agent tool-trace UI: global repo-wide Q&A flow (full read-only tool set) + Firestore agentRuns side-channel streamed live in a global chat sheet
description: Final integration work item. Backend A: new flows/askRepo.ts (clone/extend dailyBriefChat skeleton) — MODELS.fast, max 5 rounds, full read-only tool set (listDayCommits, listCompletedTasks, listRangeDigests, searchPastCommits, searchDiscordMessages, readRepoPlanningDocs, getTaskDependents, readTeamState), projectBrief stable prefix, history <=8 turns, answer + cited sources (commits + discord snippets, optional tasks); new handlers/askRepo.ts + index.ts export. Backend B: agent tool-trace side-channel — write per-round progress to repos/{repoId}/agentRuns/{runId} ({flow,steps[{label,at}],status,createdAt}) best-effort (never affects the flow); client-generated runId passed IN as input so the UI can stream the doc DURING the call (callable only resolves at end). Same trace applied to generateHandoffFlow Phase-1. Frontend: global FAB on the repo shell (all tabs) opening a chat sheet backed by new AskRepoViewModel (mirror DailyBriefChatViewModel: turns/ask()/sources); while waiting, stream the agentRuns doc and render step labels live. Fake mode: canned askRepo response + canned trace steps. i18n via existing context.l10n pattern; backend trace labels are English, displayed as-is. Light + dark mode both.
creator: gitsync
notes: PLANNING ONLY — no source modified. Baselines verified on feat/w5-ask-repo: backend typecheck 0 errors, jest 35 suites / 288 tests green; flutter analyze 3 issues (2 errors + 1 info ALL pre-existing/environmental: missing gitignored lib/firebase_options.dart + 1 user_repo.dart null-aware info), flutter test 78 pass / 1 fail (widget_test.dart, fails ONLY on the same missing firebase_options.dart — the default counter smoke test; every feature/widget test passes). KEY DISCREPANCY: the deployed firestore.rules is the wildcard dev rule (allow read,write if request.time < 2026-06-25), NOT the locked-down ruleset documented in ARCHITECTURE.md §2.2 — so client reads of agentRuns are already permitted; no rule change needed before 6/25 (matches FINAL_DEMO_PLAN verification note 'do not deploy strict rules before demo'). runId handoff: client-generated, passed IN as a callable input (justified in prd). agentRuns needs NO composite index (single-doc get/stream by id). See prd.md Open Questions for items needing orchestrator sign-off.

meta.result: backend: typecheck 0, jest 37 suites / 310 tests, lint clean; flutter: analyze 0 new issues, test 85 pass / 1 pre-existing env fail
meta.baseline: backend: typecheck 0, jest 35 suites / 288 tests; flutter: analyze 3 pre-existing issues, test 78 pass / 1 env-only fail (firebase_options.dart)
